fields.subject: Regulatory Data Collection Period Open — {{period_name}}
fields.body:
Dear {{provider_name}},

The {{period_name}} regulatory data collection period is now open. Please log in to the NCA Data Collection System to complete and submit your {{form_name}} return.

Due date: {{due_date}}

If you have any questions, contact the NCA Data Management Team.

Regards,
National Communications Authority

fields.subject: Reminder: {{form_name}} Return Due {{due_date}}
fields.body:
Dear {{provider_name}},

This is a reminder that your {{form_name}} submission for {{period_name}} is due on {{due_date}}.

Current status: {{workflow_status}}

Please log in to the NCA Data Collection System to complete your submission.

Regards,
National Communications Authority

fields.subject: OVERDUE: {{form_name}} Return for {{period_name}}
fields.body:
Dear {{provider_name}},

Your {{form_name}} submission for {{period_name}} was due on {{due_date}} and has not yet been received.

Please submit your return immediately via the NCA Data Collection System. Continued non-compliance may result in regulatory action.

Regards,
National Communications Authority

fields.subject: Correction Required: {{form_name}} Submission for {{period_name}}
fields.body:
Dear {{provider_name}},

Your {{form_name}} submission for {{period_name}} has been reviewed by NCA. Corrections are required before the submission can be approved.

Please log in to the NCA Data Collection System to view the specific fields requiring correction and resubmit.

Regards,
National Communications Authority
